basic_details.job_title: VOCPA Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Consultant, Associate Consultant and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority (VOCPA) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 15 June 2026 on the official website https://www.vocport.gov.in/. A total of 7 vacancies have been announced through the VOCPA Consultant Recruitment 2026 for the posts of Consultant, Associate Consultant, and Professional Intern.

age_limit.age_details: Upper Age Limit is relaxable in deserving cases
age_limit.details: All Posts: Upper Age Limit is relaxable in deserving cases.

qualification.education_qualification: BE (EEE) / BE(ECE) / BE(Mech), MBA(HR), Graduate in Electrical & Electronics Engineering
qualification.details: Consultant: Graduation in BE (EEE) / BE(ECE) / BE(Mech) from a recognized University / Institution with Minimum 4 years post qualification experience in the relevant field in the Port. Associate Consultant: Any degree with MBA(HR) with Total two years experience in the field of HR/ IR/ General Administration, including one year experience in Government Departments. Professional Intern: Graduate in Electrical & Electronics Engineering from a recognized University/Institution.

salary_details.details: Consultant: Rs. 60,000/- Associate Consultant: Rs. 50,000/- Professional Intern: Rs. 30,000/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for VOCPA Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.vocport.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for VOCPA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for VOCPA Recruitment 2026 is 14th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in VOCPA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for the Consultant and related posts in the V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for VOCPA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for VOCPA Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Consultant post?
faq.answer: For the Consultant post, a Graduation in BE (EEE) / BE(ECE) / BE(Mech) from a recognized University/Institution with at least 4 years of relevant experience is required.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for VOCPA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the VOCPA Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Professional Intern post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Professional Intern post in VOCPA Recruitment 2026 is Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for VOCPA Recruitment 2026 includes an Interview, Document Verification, and the preparation of a Merit List.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Tamil Nadu apply?
faq.answer: The notification does not specify any domicile restrictions, but the organization is located in Tuticorin, Tamil Nadu. Candidates from all eligible backgrounds can apply.

faq.question: Q9. What is the age limit for the Associate Consultant post?
faq.answer: The specific age limit for the Associate Consultant post is not explicitly mentioned, but the general relaxation rule applies in deserving cases.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of V.O. Chidambaranar Port Authority, which is www.vocport.gov.in.
